defects: Operational defects fixed in this branch: full native runner leaked cross-file Node state and could launch a stale dev-server-mode app late in the suite; Vite build emitted duplicate optimizeDeps warnings; successful OpenCode native real-provider runs could leave temp-home child processes alive. user_story: As an Antigravity user, I want Antigravity provider support to use my real workspace while Wardian projects context, tracks conversation state, sends work, and reads transcript evidence without conflating it with Gemini.
expected_behavior: The Antigravity provider should launch agy in the real target workspace, load AGENTS.md plus Wardian add-dir roots through visible projections, materialize linked skill roots for provider discovery, keep Antigravity separate from Gemini despite shared state roots, discover conversation ids and transcript paths, clear sessions without immediately resuming stale conversations, and expose delivery/rendering boundaries through real-provider tests.
next_verification: Rerun Antigravity delivery/native smoke/rendering before release and keep Antigravity projection/session tests current after agy runtime changes.
defects: No Antigravity delivery, native smoke, copy-command, clear-session, or rendering-audit defect remains in the verified scope. Resolved Antigravity real-provider rendering audit coverage in GitHub issue #579.
notes: Verified backend provider policy tests, provider-readiness native coverage, copy-command fake-executable coverage, Antigravity native smoke, and non-Gemini delivery on 2026-06-23. user_story: As a mobile user, I want the remote PWA to cover core agent interaction workflows so that I can monitor, command, and review agents away from the desktop.
expected_behavior: The mobile PWA should keep the watchlist status-current, open agent detail, support terminal and chat views, send typed slash commands as command input, expose selected lifecycle actions, support broadcast confirmation, show queue completion summaries, and preserve desktop-only clone boundaries.
next_verification: Rerun npm run test -- src/features/remote/RemoteMobileApp.test.tsx, npm run test, npm run test:e2e, npm run docs:check-llms, and npm run docs:build after remote PWA parity or mobile docs changes.
